---
title: "Current Projects"
# website:
#   sidebar: 
#     - title: "Projects"
#       style: "docked"
#       background: light
#       contents: 
#         - current_projects.qmd
#         - past_projects.qmd
---

### [Baylor Quarto Theme](https://github.com/nathenbyford/Baylor_theme)

Presentation theme for making reveal.js presentations. The theme includes Baylor University colors and other theme elements.
